race_meta.race_name: Midnite: Built For 2026 Not 2006 Classified Stakes (Div 2)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed legendsoftheland at position 2 (18.0% probability) vs top pick East Tyrone (26.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~8.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was East Tyrone (IRE) > Legendsoftheland (IRE), but actual result was Legendsoftheland > East Tyrone. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
